---
title: "Multiomics TB biomarker discovery project"
author: "Zaynab Mousavian"
date: "March 1, 2026"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
subtitle: Making Figures
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

# Load R packages

```{r}
library(limma)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(dplyr)
library(grid)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(caret)
library(randomForestSRC)
library(pROC)
library(glmnet)
library(Boruta)
library(doParallel)
library(patchwork)
library(corto)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(caret)
library(ggforce)   
library(ggh4x)
library(gridGraphics)
library(cowplot)
library(Hmisc)
library(readxl)
```

# Functions {.tabset}
## Function for visaulizing volcano plot 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func <- function(inputData, xaxis, yaxis, uplab, downlab, name,
                             thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                             color_up = "red", color_down = "blue", color_nsig = "grey",
                             label_points = TRUE,
                             show_threshold_lines = TRUE,
                             xlim_range = NULL,
                             highlight_names=NULL) {
  
  inputData$sig <- ifelse(inputData[[yaxis]] > thr | abs(inputData[[xaxis]]) <= thr2, 
                          "Not Significant",
                          ifelse(inputData[[xaxis]] > thr2, "Up", "Down"))
  inputData$sig <- factor(inputData$sig,
                          levels = c("Up", "Down", "Not Significant"))
  
  p <- ggplot(inputData, aes(x = .data[[xaxis]], y = -log10(.data[[yaxis]]))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig), size = 3) +  
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "",
      values = c("Up" = color_up, "Down" = color_down, "Not Significant" = color_nsig),
      labels = c("Up" = uplab,  
                 "Down" = downlab, 
                 "Not Significant" = "Not Statistically Significant")) +
    labs(y = expression(bold(-Log[10](FDR-corrected_p-value))), x = expression(bold(Log[2](Fold_Change)))) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 26) +  
    theme(
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      legend.position = c(0.025, 0.95),
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size=26, face="bold"),   
      axis.text  = element_text(size=20),               
      legend.text = element_text(size=26),               
      axis.line = element_line(size = 1.0),              
      axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.8),            
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    ) +
    guides()
  
  if (show_threshold_lines) {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(thr), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7) +  
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-thr2, thr2), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7)
  }
  
  if (label_points) {
    sig_data <- subset(inputData, sig != "Not Significant")
    p <- p +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = sig_data, aes(label = .data[[name]]),
                               size = 5,           # ↑ label font size
                               box.padding = 0.4,
                               point.padding = 0.3,
                               max.overlaps = Inf,
                               segment.color = "grey50",
                               segment.size = 0.6) 
  }
  
  if (!is.null(xlim_range)) {
    p <- p + coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim_range)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(highlight_names)) {
    highlight_data <- inputData %>% filter(.data[[name]] %in% highlight_names)
    
    p <- p +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data = highlight_data,
        aes(label = .data[[name]]),
        size = 6,
        fontface="bold",  
        box.padding = 0.5,
        point.padding = 0.4,
        max.overlaps = Inf,
        segment.size = 0.8,         
        segment.color = "black",    
        arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.025, "npc")), 
        nudge_y = 0.3
      )
  }
  return(p)
}
```

## Function for visaulizing volcano plot 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func_2 <- function(inputData, xaxis, yaxis, uplab, downlab, name,
                               thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                               color_up = "red", color_down = "blue", color_nsig = "grey",
                               label_points = TRUE,
                               show_threshold_lines = TRUE,
                               xlim_range = NULL,
                               highlight_names=NULL) {
  
  inputData$sig <- ifelse(inputData[[yaxis]] > thr | abs(inputData[[xaxis]]) <= thr2, 
                          "Not Significant",
                          ifelse(inputData[[xaxis]] > thr2, "Up", "Down"))
  inputData$sig <- factor(inputData$sig,
                          levels = c("Up", "Down", "Not Significant"))
  
  p <- ggplot(inputData, aes(x = .data[[xaxis]], y = -log10(.data[[yaxis]]))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig), size = 3) +   
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "",
      values = c("Up" = color_up, "Down" = color_down, "Not Significant" = color_nsig),
      labels = c("Up" = uplab,  
                 "Down" = downlab, 
                 "Not Significant" = "Not Statistically Significant")) +
    labs(y = expression(bold(-Log[10](p-value))), x = expression(bold(Log[2](Fold_Change)))) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 26) +  
    theme(
      legend.direction = "vertical",
      legend.position = c(0.025, 0.95),
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size=26, face="bold"),   
      axis.text  = element_text(size=20),               
      legend.text = element_text(size=26),               
      axis.line = element_line(size = 1.0),             
      axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.8),            
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    ) +
    guides()
  
  if (show_threshold_lines) {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(thr), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7) +  
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-thr2, thr2), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7)
  }
  
  if (label_points) {
    sig_data <- subset(inputData, sig != "Not Significant")
    p <- p +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = sig_data, aes(label = .data[[name]]),
                               size = 5,          
                               box.padding = 0.4,
                               point.padding = 0.3,
                               max.overlaps = Inf,
                               segment.color = "grey50",
                               segment.size = 0.6) 
  }
  
  if (!is.null(xlim_range)) {
    p <- p + coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim_range)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(highlight_names)) {
    highlight_data <- inputData %>% filter(.data[[name]] %in% highlight_names)
    
    p <- p +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data = highlight_data,
        aes(label = .data[[name]]),
        size = 6,
        fontface="bold",  
        box.padding = 0.5,
        point.padding = 0.4,
        max.overlaps = Inf,
        segment.size = 0.8,        
        segment.color = "black",    
        arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.025, "npc")), 
        nudge_y = 0.3
      )
  }
  return(p)
}
```

## Function for visaulizing heatmap plot 

```{r}
heatmapPlot_func <- function(volcanoPlot_data, ClinicalData, MetaboData,
                             logFC_col = "logFC.TB.noTB",
                             qval_col = "qValue.TB.noTB",
                             name_col = "Metabolite",
                             id_col = "ID",
                             group_col = "TB",
                             logFC_thr = 0,
                             qval_thr = 0.05,
                             up_color = "red",
                             mid_color = "white",
                             down_color = "blue",
                             annotation_colors = c("No" = "#ca6332", "Yes" = "#3abbcc"),
                             row_fontsize = 20,
                             col_fontsize = 20) {
  
  
  Up_Metabolites <- volcanoPlot_data %>%
    filter(.data[[logFC_col]] > logFC_thr & .data[[qval_col]] < qval_thr) %>%
    arrange(.data[[qval_col]]) %>%
    pull(.data[[name_col]])
  
  Down_Metabolites <- volcanoPlot_data %>%
    filter(.data[[logFC_col]] < -logFC_thr & .data[[qval_col]] < qval_thr) %>%
    arrange(.data[[qval_col]]) %>%
    pull(.data[[name_col]])
  
  DEM <- c(Up_Metabolites, Down_Metabolites)
  
  if (length(DEM) == 0) {
    stop("No significant metabolites found with the given thresholds.")
  }
  
  sample_sorted <- ClinicalData %>%
    arrange(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    pull(.data[[id_col]])
  
  annotation_group <- ClinicalData %>%
    arrange(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    pull(.data[[group_col]])
  
  
  input_data <- MetaboData[DEM, sample_sorted, drop = FALSE]
  
  input_data[is.na(input_data)] <- 0
  
  input_data_scaled <- t(apply(input_data, 1, function(x) {
    s <- scale(x)
    if (all(is.na(s))) rep(0, length(x)) else s
  }))
  
  colnames(input_data_scaled) <- colnames(input_data)
  
  color_fun <- colorRamp2(c(4, 0, -4), c(up_color, mid_color, down_color))
  split_vector_rows <- factor(
    rep(c("Up", "Down"), times = c(length(Up_Metabolites), length(Down_Metabolites))),
    levels = c("Up", "Down")
  )
  
  annotation_data <- ClinicalData %>%
    arrange(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    select(all_of(c(group_col, "Sex", "HIV")))  
  
  annotation_group <- annotation_data[[group_col]]
  annotation_sex <- annotation_data[["Sex"]]
  annotation_HIV <- annotation_data[["HIV"]]
  
  annotation_colors_list <- list(
    Group = annotation_colors,               
    Sex = c("F" = "pink", "M" = "lightblue"),
    HIV = c("Negative" = "#e24a33", "Positive" = "#9e4760")
  )
  
  
  column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    Group = annotation_group,
    Sex = annotation_sex,
    HIV = annotation_HIV,
    col = annotation_colors_list,
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    show_legend = TRUE,
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      Group = list(
        title = "Group",
        legend_direction = "horizontal",
        legend_position = "bottom",
        at = c("Yes", "No"),
        labels = c("PTB", "ORD"),
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 26, fontface = "bold"),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)
      ),
      Sex = list(
        title = "Sex",
        legend_direction = "horizontal",
        legend_position = "bottom",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 26, fontface = "bold"),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)
      ),
      HIV = list(
        title = "HIV status",
        legend_direction = "horizontal",
        legend_position = "bottom",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 26, fontface = "bold"),
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)
      )
    )
  )
  
  
  plot <- Heatmap(
    input_data_scaled,
    name = "Z-score",
    row_names_side = "left",
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = row_fontsize, col = "black",fontface="bold"),
    row_gap = unit(1.5, "mm"),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = col_fontsize),
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    column_gap = unit(1.5, "mm"),
    col = color_fun,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    show_row_dend = FALSE,
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    row_split = split_vector_rows,
    row_title = NULL,
    top_annotation = column_annotation,
    show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      title = "Z-score",
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 26, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)
    )
  )
  
  return(plot)
}

```

## Function for visaulizing PCA plot

```{r}
PCAplot <- function(pca.result, sampleData){
  inputData <- as.data.frame(pca.result$x)
  inputData$TB <- factor(sampleData$TB)
  inputData$HIV <- factor(sampleData$HIV)
  
  plot <- ggplot(inputData, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2)) +
    geom_point(size=5, aes(shape=HIV, color=TB), stroke=1) +
    stat_ellipse(aes(color=TB), type="t", linetype=2) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("Yes"="#3abbcc","No"= "#ca6332"),labels = c("Yes"="PTB", "No"="ORD"), name="Group") +
    labs(
      shape = "HIV status",
      x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pca.result$importance[2,1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
      y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pca.result$importance[2,2] * 100, 1), "%)")
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 26) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size=26, face="bold"),
      axis.text  = element_text(size=20),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.title = element_text(size=26, face="bold"),
      legend.text  = element_text(size=26),
      axis.line = element_line(size = 0.8),   
      axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.6)   
    )
  
  return(plot)
}
```

## Function for visualizing ROC plot for test using combined, cytokine and metabolite

```{r}
threerocPlot_func <- function(roc1, roc2, roc3,
                              names = c("Combined", "Cytokine", "Metabolite"),
                              colors = c("#7aa456", "#c65999", "#777acd")) {
  
  if (length(names) != 3) stop("Please provide exactly 3 names")
  if (length(colors) != 3) stop("Please provide exactly 3 colors")
  
  ci1 <- ci.auc(roc1)
  ci2 <- ci.auc(roc2)
  ci3 <- ci.auc(roc3)
  
  auc1 <- sprintf("%s AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", names[1], auc(roc1), ci1[1], ci1[3])
  auc2 <- sprintf("%s AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", names[2], auc(roc2), ci2[1], ci2[3])
  auc3 <- sprintf("%s AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", names[3], auc(roc3), ci3[1], ci3[3])
  
  sens1 <- ci.coords(roc1, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens2 <- ci.coords(roc2, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens3 <- ci.coords(roc3, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  
  sens1_triage <- ci.coords(roc1, x = 0.70, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens2_triage <- ci.coords(roc2, x = 0.70, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens3_triage <- ci.coords(roc3, x = 0.70, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  
  roc_list <- setNames(
    list(roc1, roc2, roc3),
    c(auc1, auc2, auc3)
  )
  
  plot <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 2) +   
    theme_classic(base_size = 28) +      
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.55, 0.25),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 26),      
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"), 
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 20),        
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=26, face="bold")
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors)
  
  return(list(
    plot = plot,
    sensitivity = setNames(list(sens1, sens2, sens3), names),
    sensitivity_triage = setNames(list(sens1_triage, sens2_triage, sens3_triage), names)
  ))
}
```

## Function for manhattan plot  
```{r}
manhattan_plot <- function(data, 
                           x_axis = "m/z", 
                           pval_col = "p-value", 
                           sig_col = "sig",
                           alpha_threshold = 0.0001,
                           sig_colors = c("Significant" = "red", "Not Significant" = "grey70"),
                           point_size = 2,
                           axis_title_size = 26,
                           axis_text_size = 26) {
  
  
  data$logP <- -log10(data[[pval_col]])
  
  data[[sig_col]] <- ifelse(data[[pval_col]] < alpha_threshold , "Significant", "Not Significant")
  
  plot <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_axis]], y = logP, color = .data[[sig_col]])) +
    geom_point(size = point_size, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = sig_colors) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(alpha_threshold), linetype = "dashed", 
               color = "blue", size = 0.8) +
    labs(x = x_axis, y = expression(bold(-log[10](p-value))), color = "") +
    theme_classic(base_size = axis_text_size) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.text = element_text(size = 26),
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    )
  
  return(plot)
}
```

## Function for visualizing ROC plot for test using combined, HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
threerocPlot_func_HIV <- function(roc_test, roc_test_HIVpos, roc_test_HIVneg) {
  
  ci_test <- ci.auc(roc_test)
  ci_HIVpos <- ci.auc(roc_test_HIVpos)
  ci_HIVneg <- ci.auc(roc_test_HIVneg)
  
  auc_test <- sprintf("Combined AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", auc(roc_test), ci_test[1], ci_test[3])
  auc_HIVpos <- sprintf("HIV+ AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", auc(roc_test_HIVpos), ci_HIVpos[1], ci_HIVpos[3])
  auc_HIVneg <- sprintf("HIV− AUC = %.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", auc(roc_test_HIVneg), ci_HIVneg[1], ci_HIVneg[3])
  
  sens_test <- ci.coords(roc_test, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens_HIVpos <- ci.coords(roc_test_HIVpos, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens_HIVneg <- ci.coords(roc_test_HIVneg, x = 0.98, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  
  sens_test_triage <- ci.coords(roc_test, x = 0.80, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens_HIVpos_triage <- ci.coords(roc_test_HIVpos, x = 0.80, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  sens_HIVneg_triage <- ci.coords(roc_test_HIVneg, x = 0.80, input = "specificity", ret = "sensitivity", conf.level = 0.95)
  
  roc_list <- setNames(
    list(roc_test, roc_test_HIVpos, roc_test_HIVneg),
    c(auc_test, auc_HIVpos, auc_HIVneg)
  )
  
  plot <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 1) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 26) +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.6, 0.4),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20) 
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#7aa456", "#D55E00", "violetred4"))
  
  sensitivity_results <- list(
    Combined = sens_test,
    HIVpos = sens_HIVpos,
    HIVneg = sens_HIVneg
  )
  
  sensitivity_triage_results <- list(
    Combined = sens_test_triage,
    HIVpos = sens_HIVpos_triage,
    HIVneg = sens_HIVneg_triage
  )
  
  return(list(
    plot = plot,
    sensitivity = sensitivity_results,
    sensitivity_triage = sensitivity_triage_results
  ))
}
```

## Function for visualizing ROC plot for both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func <- function(roc_train,roc_test){
  
  auc_train <- round(auc(roc_train), 3)
  auc_test <- round(auc(roc_test), 3)
  
  roc_list <- setNames(
    list(roc_train, roc_test),
    c(paste0("Training Set AUC = ", auc_train),
      paste0("Test Set AUC = ", auc_test))
  )
  
  plot <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.7, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0.7, xmax = 1, ymin = 0.9, ymax = 1),
              fill = "gray85", alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.6, 0.4),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00", "violetred4"))
  return(plot)
}
```


## Function for visualizing ROC plot for both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func <- function(roc_train,roc_test,roc_test_HIVpos,roc_test_HIVneg){
  
  auc_train <- round(auc(roc_train), 2)
  auc_test <- round(auc(roc_test), 2)
  auc_test_HIVpos <- round(auc(roc_test_HIVpos), 2)
  auc_test_HIVneg <- round(auc(roc_test_HIVneg), 2)
  
  roc_list <- setNames(
    list(roc_train, roc_test,roc_test_HIVpos,roc_test_HIVneg),
    c(paste0("Training Set AUC = ", auc_train),
      paste0("Test Set AUC = ", auc_test),
      paste0("Test HIV+ Set AUC = ", auc_test_HIVpos),
      paste0("Test HIV- Set AUC = ", auc_test_HIVneg))
  )
  
  plot <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.7, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0.7, xmax = 1, ymin = 0.9, ymax = 1),
              fill = "gray85", alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.6, 0.4),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00", "violetred4","darkgreen","darkblue"))
  return(plot)
}
```

## Function for visualizing ROC plot for both train and test and both no TB SA and no TB TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2 <- function(roc_train,roc_test,roc_test_noTBSA,roc_test_noTBGWAS){
  
  auc_train <- round(auc(roc_train), 2)
  auc_test <- round(auc(roc_test), 2)
  auc_test_noTBSA <- round(auc(roc_test_noTBSA), 2)
  auc_test_noTBGWAS <- round(auc(roc_test_noTBGWAS), 2)
  
  roc_list <- setNames(
    list(roc_train, roc_test,roc_test_noTBSA,roc_test_noTBGWAS),
    c(paste0("Training Set AUC = ", auc_train),
      paste0("Test Set AUC = ", auc_test),
      paste0("Test noTB SA Set AUC = ", auc_test_noTBSA),
      paste0("Test noTB TBGWAS Set AUC = ", auc_test_noTBGWAS))
  )
  
  plot <- ggroc(roc_list, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.7, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = 0.7, xmax = 1, ymin = 0.9, ymax = 1),
              fill = "gray85", alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      legend.position = c(0.6, 0.4),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00", "violetred4","darkgreen","darkblue"))
  return(plot)
}
```


## Function for boxplot visualization

```{r}
boxplot_func <- function(data, xaxis, yaxis, group){
  y_min <- min(data$value, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.2
  y_max <- max(data$value, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.2
  
  plot <- ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[xaxis]], y = .data[[yaxis]], fill = .data[[group]])) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6, width = 0.6, 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = .data[[group]]), 
                position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75),
                size = 2.5, alpha = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Yes"="#3abbcc","No"= "#ca6332"),
                       labels = c("Yes"="PTB","No"= "ORD")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Yes"="#3abbcc","No"= "#ca6332")) +
    labs(y = expression(bold(log[2](Plasma_Concentration))), x = NULL, color = NULL) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
      axis.text  = element_text(size = 30, face="bold",angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 30),
      axis.line = element_line(size = 0.9),
      axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.7)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)) +
    
    stat_compare_means(
      aes(group = .data[[group]]),
      method = "wilcox.test",      
      label = "p.signif",        
      hide.ns = TRUE,             
      label.y = y_max + 0.1,
      size = 6,                  
      fontface = "bold"  
    )
  
  return(plot)
}
```
# Which data? {.tabset}
## Data at baseline (only adults) - PCA Metabolites

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))
dim(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
pca.metabolite <- prcomp(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult, scale. = TRUE,center = TRUE)
plot(pca.metabolite)
pca.result <- summary(pca.metabolite)
Fig1_a_pca <- PCAplot(pca.result, ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult)
```


## Data at baseline (only adults) - PCA Cyotkines

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed),ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
pca.cytokine <- prcomp(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed, scale. = TRUE,center = TRUE)
plot(pca.cytokine)
pca.result <- summary(pca.cytokine)
Fig1_b_pca <- PCAplot(pca.result, ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult)
```


## Data at baseline (only adults) - DE Metabolites

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]
dim(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("noTB","TB","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(TB-noTB,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "fdr"))
volcanoPlot_data_MET <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_MET) <- c("logFC.TB.noTB","pValue.TB.noTB","qValue.TB.noTB")

volcanoPlot_data_MET$Metabolite <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_MET)
save(volcanoPlot_data_MET,file="../Results/DEA/DEM_Baseline_Adult.RData")
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB>0&pValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB<0&pValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB>0&qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB<0&qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for TB vs. no TB 

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                   xaxis = "logFC.TB.noTB", 
                   yaxis = "pValue.TB.noTB", 
                   uplab = "Up in PTB", 
                   downlab = "Down in PTB", 
                   name = "Metabolite",
                   thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                   label_points = FALSE,
                   xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                   highlight_names = c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE"))
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig1_a_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                                   xaxis = "logFC.TB.noTB", 
                                   yaxis = "qValue.TB.noTB", 
                                   uplab = "Up in PTB", 
                                   downlab = "Down in PTB", 
                                   name = "Metabolite",
                                   thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                   label_points = FALSE,
                                   xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                                   highlight_names = c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE"))
```

### Visualizing heatmap plot 

```{r}
myHeatmap <- heatmapPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_MET, ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult, MetaboData_Baseline_Adult,name_col = "Metabolite")
draw(myHeatmap)
Fig1_a_heatmap <- grid.grabExpr(draw(myHeatmap, newpage = FALSE))
```


## Data at baseline (only adults) - DE Cytokines

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult),ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("noTB","TB","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(TB-noTB,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "BH"))
volcanoPlot_data_CYT <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT) <- c("logFC.TB.noTB","pValue.TB.noTB","qValue.TB.noTB")

volcanoPlot_data_CYT$Cytokine <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT)
save(volcanoPlot_data_CYT,file="../Results/DEA/DEC_Baseline_Adult.RData")
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB>0&pValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB<0&pValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB>0&qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.TB.noTB<0&qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for TB vs. no TB 

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                   xaxis = "logFC.TB.noTB", 
                   yaxis = "pValue.TB.noTB", 
                   uplab = "Up in PTB", 
                   downlab = "Down in PTB", 
                   name = "Cytokine",
                   thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                   label_points = FALSE,
                   xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                   highlight_names = c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.1beta" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   ,  "IFN.beta"))
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig1_b_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                                   xaxis = "logFC.TB.noTB", 
                                   yaxis = "qValue.TB.noTB", 
                                   uplab = "Up in PTB", 
                                   downlab = "Down in PTB", 
                                   name = "Cytokine",
                                   thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                   label_points = FALSE,
                                   xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                                   highlight_names = c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.1beta" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   ,  "IFN.beta"))
```

### Visualizing heatmap plot 

```{r}
myHeatmap <- heatmapPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult, CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed,name_col="Cytokine")
draw(myHeatmap)
Fig1_b_heatmap <- grid.grabExpr(draw(myHeatmap, newpage = FALSE))
```

## Make Supplementary Figures 1 and 2

```{r}
SuppFig1 <- plot_grid((Fig1_a_pca/Fig1_a_volcano),Fig1_a_heatmap, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1.25))
SuppFig2 <- plot_grid((Fig1_b_pca/Fig1_b_volcano),Fig1_b_heatmap, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1.25))
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/SuppFig1.pdf",height = 22,width = 32)
plot_grid(SuppFig1,nrow=1,ncol=1,rel_heights = c(1,1))
dev.off()
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/SuppFig2.pdf",height = 22,width = 32)
plot_grid(SuppFig2,nrow=1,ncol=1,rel_heights = c(1,1))
dev.off()
```



## Data at baseline (only adults) - Multiomics biomarker
### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()
```

### Make train and test data  


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))

set.seed(123) 
test_percentage <- 0.3 

test_indices <- createDataPartition(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group, p = test_percentage, list = FALSE)

sampleData_train <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[-test_indices, ]
sampleData_test <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[test_indices, ]


removed_samles_train <- which(!sampleData_train$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_train <- sampleData_train[-removed_samles_train,]
removed_samles_test <- which(!sampleData_test$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_test <- sampleData_test[-removed_samles_test,]

table(sampleData_train$TB,sampleData_train$HIV)
table(sampleData_test$TB,sampleData_test$HIV)

metaboData.train <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_train$ID,]
cytokineData.train <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_train$ID,]
sampleData.train <- sampleData_train
metaboData.test <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_test$ID,]
cytokineData.test <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_test$ID,]
sampleData.test <- sampleData_test


metaboData.train <- as.data.frame(metaboData.train)
cytokineData.train <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train)

sampleData_test_HIVpos <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive")
sampleData_test_HIVneg <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Negative")
sampleData_test_noTBSA <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "SA"))
sampleData_test_noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "TBGWAS"))

metaboData.test.HIVpos <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData_test_HIVpos

metaboData.test.HIVneg <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData_test_HIVneg

metaboData.test.noTBSA <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBSA <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBSA <- sampleData_test_noTBSA

metaboData.test.noTBGWAS <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test_noTBGWAS
```

### Make a combined data including metabolites and cytokine for feature selection

```{r}
combinedData.train <- cbind(metaboData.train,cytokineData.train)
combinedData.test <- cbind(metaboData.test,cytokineData.test)
combinedData.test.HIVpos <- cbind(metaboData.test.HIVpos,cytokineData.test.HIVpos)
combinedData.test.HIVneg <- cbind(metaboData.test.HIVneg,cytokineData.test.HIVneg)
combinedData.test.noTBSA <- cbind(metaboData.test.noTBSA,cytokineData.test.noTBSA)
combinedData.test.noTBGWAS <- cbind(metaboData.test.noTBGWAS,cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS)
combinedData.train$Group= as.factor(sampleData.train$TB)
combinedData.train$Group <- factor(combinedData.train$Group, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

### Run Boruta

```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(111)
boruta_data <- Boruta(Group~., data = combinedData.train, doTrace = 2, maxRuns=400)
boruta_data <- TentativeRoughFix(boruta_data)
boruta_stats <- attStats(boruta_data)
boruta_stats$cytokine <- rownames(boruta_stats)
boruta_stats <- boruta_stats %>% filter(decision =="Confirmed")
boruta_stats <- boruta_stats[order(boruta_stats$meanImp,decreasing = TRUE),c("cytokine","meanImp")]
plot(boruta_data, cex.axis = 1.1, xlab = "", las = 2,ylab="")
title("Cytokine",line=+1,adj=0,cex.main=2)
combined_boruta <- boruta_stats$cytokine
combined_boruta
combined_boruta_top3 <- combined_boruta[1:3]
combined_boruta_top5 <- combined_boruta[1:5]
saveRDS(combined_boruta,file="../Results/Boruta/selectedCombined_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(combined_boruta_top3, file="../Results/Boruta/selectedCombined_top3_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(combined_boruta_top5, file="../Results/Boruta/selectedCombined_top5_baseline_adult.rds")
combined_boruta <- readRDS("../Results/Boruta/selectedCombined_baseline_adult.rds")
```

### Run randomforestSRC

```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(111)
rf_model <- rfsrc(Group ~ ., data = combinedData.train, ntree = 500, importance = TRUE)
vimp <- rf_model$importance
vimp[order(vimp[,1],decreasing = TRUE),]
vimp.rfsrc(rf_model)
min_depth <- var.select(rf_model)
selected_combined_SRC <- min_depth$md.obj$topvars
selected_combined_SRC_top2 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 2)
selected_combined_SRC_top5 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 5)
selected_combined_SRC_top7 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 7)
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC,file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top2, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top2_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top5, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top5_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top7, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
combined_boruta <- readRDS("../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_baseline_adult.rds")
```

### Selected cytokines from randomforestSRC

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.1beta" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   ,  "IFN.beta")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS)
```


### Selected metabolites from randomforestSRC

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_metabols <- c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")
selected_metabols

data <-as.data.frame(metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBSA[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```


#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_metabol_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM model

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBSA[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_HIVpos,roc_metabol_test_HIVneg)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_noTBSA,roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS)
```



### Combined model

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <- c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.1beta" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   ,  "IFN.beta")
selected_metabols <- selected_metabols <- c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")
selected_combined <- c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.1beta" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   ,  "IFN.beta","METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")

data <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.noTBSA[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")

ptb_prob <- prob_combined_test[, "Yes"]
cor.test(ptb_prob, sampleData.test$AGE, method="spearman")

df <- sampleData.test
df$Score <- ptb_prob
lm(Score ~ TB + AGE + Sex + HIV, data = df)
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_combined_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_combined_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_combined_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_combined_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_combined_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_combined_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result <- threerocPlot_func_HIV(roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result$plot
SuppFig3 <- result$plot
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_noTBSA,roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS)
```



### Genarate figures
```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_cytokine_test, roc_metabol_test)
result$plot  
SuppFig3_total <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_combined_test_HIVpos, roc_combined_test_HIVneg, names=c("Combined","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#50b957", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_combined_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS, roc_combined_test_noTBSA,names=c("Combined","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#50b957", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_combined_noTB <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg,names=c("Cytokine","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#d84882",  "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_cytokine_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA,names=c("Cytokine","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#d84882","orange" ,"#729cda"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_cytokine_noTB <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test, roc_metabol_test_HIVpos, roc_metabol_test_HIVneg,
                            names=c("Metabolite","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#7b63d4", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_metabol_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test, roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS, roc_metabol_test_noTBSA,names=c("Metabolite","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#7b63d4", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
SuppFig3_metabol_noTB <- result$plot 

save(SuppFig3_metabol_noTB,SuppFig3_metabol_HIV,SuppFig3_cytokine_noTB,SuppFig3_cytokine_HIV,SuppFig3_combined_noTB,SuppFig3_combined_HIV,SuppFig3_total,file="../Results/SuppFig3.RData")
```

## Make Supplementary Figure 3
```{r}
l <- load("../Results/SuppFig3.RData")

SuppFig3_total$layers <-SuppFig3_total$layers[!sapply(SuppFig3_total$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomVline"))]
tpp_boxes <- data.frame(
  xmin = c(0.7, 0.98),   # Specificity lower limits
  xmax = c(1.0, 1.0),   # Specificity upper limits
  ymin = c(0.9, 0.65),  # Sensitivity lower limits
  ymax = c(1.0, 1),   # Sensitivity upper limits
  label = c("Triage Test", "POC Diagnostic")
)
SuppFig3_total <- SuppFig3_total+ geom_rect(data = tpp_boxes,
                                            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = label),
                                            alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Triage Test" = "green", "POC Diagnostic" = "red"))+
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "TPP Boxes"))+
  labs(title = "ROC Curves with Target Product Profile (TPP) Thresholds")+
  theme(title = element_text(size=12))


pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/SuppFig3.pdf",width=10,height = 10)
SuppFig3_total
dev.off()
```

## Data at baseline (only adults) - 5-marker Multi-omics biomarker
### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()
```

### Make train and test data  


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))

set.seed(123) 
test_percentage <- 0.3 

test_indices <- createDataPartition(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group, p = test_percentage, list = FALSE)

sampleData_train <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[-test_indices, ]
sampleData_test <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[test_indices, ]


removed_samles_train <- which(!sampleData_train$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_train <- sampleData_train[-removed_samles_train,]
removed_samles_test <- which(!sampleData_test$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_test <- sampleData_test[-removed_samles_test,]

table(sampleData_train$TB,sampleData_train$HIV)
table(sampleData_test$TB,sampleData_test$HIV)

metaboData.train <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_train$ID,]
cytokineData.train <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_train$ID,]
sampleData.train <- sampleData_train
metaboData.test <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_test$ID,]
cytokineData.test <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_test$ID,]
sampleData.test <- sampleData_test


metaboData.train <- as.data.frame(metaboData.train)
cytokineData.train <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train)

sampleData_test_HIVpos <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive")
sampleData_test_HIVneg <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Negative")
sampleData_test_noTBSA <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "SA"))
sampleData_test_noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "TBGWAS"))

metaboData.test.HIVpos <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData_test_HIVpos

metaboData.test.HIVneg <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData_test_HIVneg

metaboData.test.noTBSA <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBSA <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBSA <- sampleData_test_noTBSA

metaboData.test.noTBGWAS <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test_noTBGWAS
```

### Selected cytokines in the 5-marker signature

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("IFN.gamma" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS)
```


### Selected metabolites in the 5-marker signature

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_metabols <- c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")
selected_metabols

data <-as.data.frame(metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBSA[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```


#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_metabol_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM model

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBSA[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_HIVpos,roc_metabol_test_HIVneg)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_noTBSA,roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS)
```



### Combined model

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <- c("IFN.gamma" ,"IL.22"   ,  "IL.10"   )
selected_metabols <- selected_metabols <- c("METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")
selected_combined <- c("IFN.gamma" , "IL.22"   ,  "IL.10" ,"METHIONINE", "OXOPROLINE")

data <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.noTBSA[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_train[,1],
```
