```{r}
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")

ptb_prob <- prob_combined_test[, "Yes"]
cor.test(ptb_prob, sampleData.test$AGE, method="spearman")

df <- sampleData.test
df$Score <- ptb_prob
lm(Score ~ TB + AGE + Sex + HIV, data = df)
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_combined_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_combined_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_combined_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_combined_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_combined_test_noTBSA <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_combined_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result <- threerocPlot_func_HIV(roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result$plot
SuppFig5 <- result$plot
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_noTBSA,roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS)
```



### Genarate figures
```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_cytokine_test, roc_metabol_test)
result$plot  
Fig2_total <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_combined_test_HIVpos, roc_combined_test_HIVneg, names=c("Combined","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#50b957", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig2_combined_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_combined_test_noTBGWAS, roc_combined_test_noTBSA,names=c("Combined","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#50b957", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig2_combined_noTB <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg,names=c("Cytokine","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#d84882",  "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig2_cytokine_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA,names=c("Cytokine","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#d84882","orange" ,"#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig2_cytokine_noTB <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test, roc_metabol_test_HIVpos, roc_metabol_test_HIVneg,
                            names=c("Metabolite","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#7b63d4", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig2_metabol_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test, roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS, roc_metabol_test_noTBSA,names=c("Metabolite","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#7b63d4", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig2_metabol_noTB <- result$plot 

save(Fig2_metabol_noTB,Fig2_metabol_HIV,Fig2_cytokine_noTB,Fig2_cytokine_HIV,Fig2_combined_noTB,Fig2_combined_HIV,Fig2_total,file="../Results/Fig2.RData")
```

## Make Figure 2
```{r}
l <- load("../Results/Fig2.RData")

Fig2_total$layers <-Fig2_total$layers[!sapply(Fig2_total$layers, function(x) inherits(x$geom, "GeomVline"))]
tpp_boxes <- data.frame(
  xmin = c(0.7, 0.98),   # Specificity lower limits
  xmax = c(1.0, 1.0),   # Specificity upper limits
  ymin = c(0.9, 0.65),  # Sensitivity lower limits
  ymax = c(1.0, 1),   # Sensitivity upper limits
  label = c("Triage Test", "POC Diagnostic")
)
Fig2_total <- Fig2_total+ geom_rect(data = tpp_boxes,
                                    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = label),
                                    alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Triage Test" = "green", "POC Diagnostic" = "red"))+
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "TPP Boxes"))+
  labs(title = "ROC Curves with Target Product Profile (TPP) Thresholds")+
  theme(title = element_text(size=12))


pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 2.pdf",width=32,height = 30)
p1 <- plot_grid( NULL, Fig2_total,rel_widths = c(1,1.5),ncol = 2,labels = c("a", "b"),label_size = 36,label_fontface = "bold")
p2 <- plot_grid(Fig2_combined_HIV,Fig2_cytokine_HIV,Fig2_metabol_HIV,Fig2_combined_noTB,Fig2_cytokine_noTB,Fig2_metabol_noTB,nrow=2,ncol=3,labels = c("c","d","e","f","g","h"),label_size = 36,label_fontface = "bold",label_y = 1.1)
plot_grid(p1,p2,nrow=2,ncol=1,rel_heights = c(1,2))
dev.off()
```


## Data at baseline (only adults) - other signatures
### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$Ratio <- ((2^MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$KYNURENINE)/(2^MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$TRYPTOPHAN))+(2^MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$RETINOL)
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$Retinol <- (2^MetaboData_Baseline_Adult$RETINOL)
```

### Make train and test data  


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))

set.seed(123) 
test_percentage <- 0.3 

test_indices <- createDataPartition(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group, p = test_percentage, list = FALSE)

sampleData_train <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[-test_indices, ]
sampleData_test <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[test_indices, ]


removed_samles_train <- which(!sampleData_train$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_train <- sampleData_train[-removed_samles_train,]
removed_samles_test <- which(!sampleData_test$ID%in%row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult))
sampleData_test <- sampleData_test[-removed_samles_test,]

table(sampleData_train$TB,sampleData_train$HIV)
table(sampleData_test$TB,sampleData_test$HIV)

metaboData.train <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_train$ID,]
cytokineData.train <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_train$ID,]
sampleData.train <- sampleData_train
metaboData.test <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_test$ID,]
cytokineData.test <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_test$ID,]
sampleData.test <- sampleData_test


metaboData.train <- as.data.frame(metaboData.train)
cytokineData.train <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train)

sampleData_test_HIVpos <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive")
sampleData_test_HIVneg <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Negative")
sampleData_test_noTBSA <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "SA"))
sampleData_test_noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test%>%
  filter(TB == "Yes" | (TB == "No" & Study == "TBGWAS"))

metaboData.test.HIVpos <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVpos$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData_test_HIVpos

metaboData.test.HIVneg <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_HIVneg$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData_test_HIVneg

metaboData.test.noTBSA <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBSA <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBSA$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBSA <- sampleData_test_noTBSA

metaboData.test.noTBGWAS <- metaboData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS <- cytokineData.test[sampleData_test_noTBGWAS$ID,]
sampleData.test.noTBGWAS <- sampleData_test_noTBGWAS
```

### Selected metabolites (Ratio)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# selected_combined <- read_rds(file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
selected_metabols <- c("Ratio")
selected_metabols

data <-as.data.frame(metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBSA[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```


#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_metabol_train_ratio <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_ratio <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVpos_ratio <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVneg_ratio <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM model

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_metabol_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBSA[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBSA_ratio <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_noTBGWAS[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS_ratio <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train_ratio,roc_metabol_test_ratio)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train_ratio,roc_metabol_test_ratio,roc_metabol_test_HIVpos_ratio,roc_metabol_test_HIVneg_ratio)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_metabol_train_ratio,roc_metabol_test_ratio,roc_metabol_test_noTBSA_ratio,roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS_ratio)
```

### Genarate figures
```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_ratio,
                            names=c("Combined","Metabolite","Kyn/Trp + retinol"),colors=c("#50b957","#7b63d4", "#3abbcc"))
result$plot  
Fig3_metabol <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test_ratio, roc_metabol_test_HIVpos_ratio, roc_metabol_test_HIVneg_ratio,
                            names=c("Kyn/Trp + retinol","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#3abbcc", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig3_metabol_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test_ratio, roc_metabol_test_noTBGWAS_ratio, roc_metabol_test_noTBSA_ratio,names=c("Kyn/Trp + retinol","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#3abbcc", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig3_metabol_noTB <- result$plot 

save(Fig3_metabol_noTB,Fig3_metabol_HIV,Fig3_metabol,file="../Results/Fig3_metabol.RData")
```


### Selected cytokines (IFNG)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("IFN.gamma")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train_IFNG <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test_IFNG <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IFNG <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IFNG <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IFNG <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IFNG <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_IFNG)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IFNG)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IFNG,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IFNG)
```

### Genarate figures
```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_IFNG,
                            names=c("Combined","Cytokine","IFN-gamma"),colors=c("#50b957","#c65999","#e08181"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_IFNG, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IFNG, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IFNG,
                            names=c("IFN-gamma","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#e08181", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_HIV <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_IFNG, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IFNG, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IFNG,names=c("IFN-gamma","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#e08181", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_noTB <- result$plot 

save(Fig3_cytokine_noTB,Fig3_cytokine_HIV,Fig3_cytokine,file="../Results/Fig3_cytokine.RData")
```

### Selected cytokines (IP.10)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("IP.10")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train_IP10 <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test_IP10 <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IP10 <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IP10 <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IP10 <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IP10 <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_IP10)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IP10)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IP10)
```

### Selected cytokines (TNF.alpha)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("TNF.alpha")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train_TNF <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test_TNF <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_TNF <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_TNF <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_TNF <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_TNF <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_TNF)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_TNF)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_TNF)
```

### Selected cytokines (IL6+IP.10+IL10)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("IP.10","IL.6","IL.10")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBSA <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBSA[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBSA$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBSA$TB))
data_test_noTBSA$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBSA$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_noTBGWAS <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.noTBGWAS[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.noTBGWAS$TB))
data_test_noTBGWAS$Class <- factor(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train_third <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test_third <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_third <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_third <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only no TB SA)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBSA, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBSA$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBSA[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBSA$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])
roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_third <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only no TB TBGWAS)
###### Test SVM

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS)
prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS <- predict(svmTune, data_test_noTBGWAS, type="prob")
```


###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_noTBGWAS$Class,
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS[,1],
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_noTBGWAS$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_third <- roc0
```



##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_third,roc_cytokine_test_third)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_third,roc_cytokine_test_third,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_third,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_third)
```

##### Both train and test and both no TB from SA and TBGWAS

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func_2(roc_cytokine_train_third,roc_cytokine_test_third,roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_third,roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_third)
```


### Selected cytokines (CRP)

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
selected_cytokines <-c("CRP")
selected_cytokines

CRP <- read_excel("../../Data/ReadyData/2025-03-03_PotPrev_Emory_Data.xlsx")
CRP <- CRP%>%filter(CRP=="Yes")
CRP$study_id <- paste0("SA",CRP$study_id)
CRP <- as.data.frame(CRP)
row.names(CRP) <- CRP$study_id
CRP <- CRP[,c("study_id","Results")]
names(CRP) <- c("study_id","CRP")

cytokineData.train <- CRP[intersect(row.names(cytokineData.train),CRP$study_id),"CRP",drop=FALSE]
row.names(sampleData.train) <- sampleData.train$ID
sampleData.train <- sampleData.train[row.names(cytokineData.train),]

cytokineData.test <- CRP[intersect(row.names(cytokineData.test),CRP$study_id),"CRP",drop=FALSE]
row.names(sampleData.test) <- sampleData.test$ID
sampleData.test <- sampleData.test[row.names(cytokineData.test),]

cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- CRP[intersect(row.names(cytokineData.test.HIVpos),CRP$study_id),"CRP",drop=FALSE]
row.names(sampleData.test.HIVpos) <- sampleData.test.HIVpos$ID
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData.test.HIVpos[row.names(cytokineData.test.HIVpos),]

cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- CRP[intersect(row.names(cytokineData.test.HIVneg),CRP$study_id),"CRP",drop=FALSE]
row.names(sampleData.test.HIVneg) <- sampleData.test.HIVneg$ID
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData.test.HIVneg[row.names(cytokineData.test.HIVneg),]

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$TB))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$TB))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$TB))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$TB))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("Yes","No"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train_CRP <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test_CRP <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_CRP <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_CRP <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_CRP,roc_cytokine_test_CRP)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train_CRP,roc_cytokine_test_CRP,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_CRP,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_CRP)
```


### Genarate figures

```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_IP10,roc_cytokine_test_TNF,roc_cytokine_test_third,
                            names=c("IP.10","TNF.alpha","IP.10,IL.6,IL10"),colors=c("#6a732a","#c57ebf","#ae7d45" ))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_others <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_IP10, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_IP10, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_IP10,
                            names=c("IP.10","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#6a732a", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_HIV_IP10 <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_IP10, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_IP10, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_IP10,names=c("IP.10","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#6a732a", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_noTB_IP10 <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_TNF, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_TNF, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_TNF,
                            names=c("TNF.alpha","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#c57ebf", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_HIV_TNF <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_TNF, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_TNF, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_TNF,names=c("TNF.alpha","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#c57ebf", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_noTB_TNF <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_third, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos_third, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg_third,
                            names=c("IP.10,IL.6,IL10","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#ae7d45", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_HIV_third <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test_third, roc_cytokine_test_noTBGWAS_third, roc_cytokine_test_noTBSA_third,names=c("IP.10,IL.6,IL10","Symptomatic contacts","Hospitalized ORD"),colors=c("#ae7d45", "orange","#729cda"))
result$plot  
Fig3_cytokine_noTB_third <- result$plot 

save(Fig3_cytokine_noTB_IP10,Fig3_cytokine_noTB_TNF,Fig3_cytokine_noTB_third,Fig3_cytokine_HIV_IP10,Fig3_cytokine_HIV_TNF,Fig3_cytokine_HIV_third,Fig3_cytokine_others,file="../Results/Fig3_cytokine_others.RData")
```

## Make Figure 3

```{r}
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure3.pdf",width=32,height = 20)
plot_grid(Fig3_metabol,Fig3_metabol_HIV,Fig3_metabol_noTB,ncol=3,labels=c("a","b","c"),label_size = 36)/plot_grid(Fig3_cytokine,Fig3_cytokine_HIV,Fig3_cytokine_noTB,ncol=3,labels = c("d","e","f"),label_size = 36)
dev.off()
```

## Make Supplementary Figure 4

```{r}
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/SuppFig4.pdf",width=40,height = 20)
p1 <- plot_grid(Fig3_cytokine_HIV_IP10,Fig3_cytokine_HIV_TNF,Fig3_cytokine_HIV_third,Fig3_cytokine_noTB_IP10,Fig3_cytokine_noTB_TNF,Fig3_cytokine_noTB_third,ncol=3,nrow=2,labels = c("b","c","d","e","f","g"),label_size = 36)
p2 <- plot_grid(Fig3_cytokine_others,labels = c("a"),label_size = 36)
plot_grid(p2,p1,rel_heights = c(1,1),rel_widths = c(0.5,1.5))
dev.off()
```



## Data at baseline (only adults) - DE Metabolites for treatment response

### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]
dim(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "fdr"))
volcanoPlot_data_MET <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_MET) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_MET$Metabolite <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_MET)
save(volcanoPlot_data_MET,file="../Results/DEA/DEM_Baseline_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())

volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig1_a_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Metabolite",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                                     highlight_names = c("VALINE","MALATE",DEGs))+
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.025, 0.025),
    legend.justification = c(0, 0)
  )
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Metabolite",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                 highlight_names = c("VALINE","MALATE",DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## Data at baseline (only adults) - DE Cytokines for treatment response

### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "BH"))
volcanoPlot_data_CYT <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_CYT$Cytokine <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT)
save(volcanoPlot_data_CYT,file="../Results/DEA/DEC_Baseline_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig1_b_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Cytokine",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                                     highlight_names = c("IL.17A",DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Cytokine",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                 highlight_names = c("IL.17A"))
```


## Data at Week 8 (only adults) - DE Metabolites for treatment response

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
SA_samples$LONGID <- gsub("SA","",SA_samples$ID)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))

ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Visit.Week==8,TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,]
dim(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "fdr"))
volcanoPlot_data_MET <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_MET) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_MET$Metabolite <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_MET)
save(volcanoPlot_data_MET,file="../Results/DEA/DEM_week8_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig2_a_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Metabolite",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                                     highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Metabolite",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                 highlight_names = c("URATE","ANSERINE"))
```

## Data at Week 8 (only adults) - DE Cytokines for treatment response

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
SA_samples$LONGID <- gsub("SA","",SA_samples$ID)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))

ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Visit.Week==8,TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "BH"))
volcanoPlot_data_CYT <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_CYT$Cytokine <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT)
save(volcanoPlot_data_CYT,file="../Results/DEA/DEC_week8_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())

volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig2_b_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Cytokine",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                                     highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Cytokine",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                 highlight_names = c("IL.8"))
```



## Data at Week 17 or 26 (only adults) - DE Metabolites for treatment response

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
SA_samples$LONGID <- gsub("SA","",SA_samples$ID)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))

ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Visit.Week==17|Visit.Week==26)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,]
dim(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "fdr"))
volcanoPlot_data_MET <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_MET) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_MET$Metabolite <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_MET)
save(volcanoPlot_data_MET,file="../Results/DEA/DEM_week17or26_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())

volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig3_a_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Metabolite",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                                     highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_MET, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Metabolite",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-3, 3),
                 highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## Data at Week 17 or 26 (only adults) - DE Cytokines for treatment response

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
SA_samples$LONGID <- gsub("SA","",SA_samples$ID)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))

ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Visit.Week==17|Visit.Week==26)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Load data

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,]
dim(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed)
```


### Creating a covariates matrix

```{r}
CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed%>%t()
covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
```

### Model

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("Cure","Failure","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(Cure-Failure,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)
```

### Visualize Limma results for metabolite data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
logFC <- as.data.frame(fit.b$coefficients)
pValue <- as.data.frame(fit.b$p.value)
qValue <- apply(pValue,2,function(x) p.adjust(x,method = "BH"))
volcanoPlot_data_CYT <- cbind(logFC=logFC,pValue=pValue,qValue=qValue)
names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT) <- c("logFC.Cure.Failure","pValue.Cure.Failure","qValue.Cure.Failure")

volcanoPlot_data_CYT$Cytokine <- row.names(volcanoPlot_data_CYT)
save(volcanoPlot_data_CYT,file="../Results/DEA/DEC_week17or26_Adult_Treatment.RData")
DEGs <- c(volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names(),
          volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
            filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&pValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%row.names())
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure>0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%
  filter(logFC.Cure.Failure<0&qValue.Cure.Failure<0.05)%>%
  nrow()
```

### Volcano plot for Cure vs. Failure

#### Using p-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Fig3_b_volcano <- volcanoPlot_func_2(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                                     xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                                     yaxis = "pValue.Cure.Failure", 
                                     uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                                     downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                                     name = "Cytokine",
                                     thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                                     label_points = FALSE,
                                     xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                                     highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

#### Using q-value 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
volcanoPlot_func(volcanoPlot_data_CYT, 
                 xaxis = "logFC.Cure.Failure", 
                 yaxis = "qValue.Cure.Failure", 
                 uplab = "Up in PTB-Cured", 
                 downlab = "Down in PTB-Cured", 
                 name = "Cytokine",
                 thr = 0.05, thr2 = 0, 
                 label_points = FALSE,
                 xlim_range = c(-4, 4),
                 highlight_names = c(DEGs))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```


## Make Supplementary Figure 5

```{r}
Fig <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(
    Fig1_a_volcano, Fig2_a_volcano, Fig3_a_volcano,
    labels = c("a", "c", "e"),
    label_size = 36,
    nrow = 3,
    rel_heights = c(1,1,1)
  ),
  plot_grid(
    Fig1_b_volcano, Fig2_b_volcano, Fig3_b_volcano,
    labels = c("b", "d", "f"),
    label_size = 36,
    nrow = 3,
    rel_heights = c(1,1,1)
  ),
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1)
)

pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/SuppFig5.pdf",height = 30,width = 20)
Fig
dev.off()
```

## Data at baseline (only adults) - Multi-omics biomarker for predicting treatment response including Boruta
### Load metabolite, cytokine and clinical data 

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
```
