```{r}
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="Yes",Outcome%in%c("FAILED","CURED"))
```

### Make train and test data  

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group <- cbind(paste0(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Outcome,",",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$HIV))

set.seed(123) 
test_percentage <- 0.3 # specify the percentage of data to be used for testing

test_indices <- createDataPartition(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$Group, p = test_percentage, list = FALSE)

sampleData_train <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[-test_indices, ]
sampleData_test <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[test_indices, ]

# library(caret)
# 
# sampleData_train$Outcome <- as.factor(sampleData_train$Outcome)
# 
# 
# train_down <-downSample(x = sampleData_train[, !(names(sampleData_train) %in% "Outcome")],
#                      y = sampleData_train$Outcome)
# 
# # caret renames the outcome column to "Class"
# table(train_down$Class)
# names(train_down)[names(train_down) == "Class"] <- "Outcome"
# sampleData_train <- train_down

metaboData.train <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_train$ID,]
cytokineData.train <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_train$ID,]
sampleData.train <- sampleData_train
metaboData.test <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[sampleData_test$ID,]
cytokineData.test <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[sampleData_test$ID,]
sampleData.test <- sampleData_test

metaboData.train <- as.data.frame(metaboData.train)
cytokineData.train <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train)

sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData.test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Positive")
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData.test%>%
  filter(HIV=="Negative")


metaboData.test.HIVpos <- metaboData.test[sampleData.test.HIVpos$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVpos <- cytokineData.test[sampleData.test.HIVpos$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVpos <- sampleData.test.HIVpos

metaboData.test.HIVneg <- metaboData.test[sampleData.test.HIVneg$ID,]
cytokineData.test.HIVneg <- cytokineData.test[sampleData.test.HIVneg$ID,]
sampleData.test.HIVneg <- sampleData.test.HIVneg


table(sampleData.train$TB,sampleData.train$Outcome)
table(sampleData.test$TB,sampleData.test$Outcome)
```

### Make a combined data including metabolites and cytokine for feature selection

```{r}
combinedData.train <- cbind(metaboData.train,cytokineData.train)
combinedData.test <- cbind(metaboData.test,cytokineData.test)
combinedData.test.HIVpos <- cbind(metaboData.test.HIVpos,cytokineData.test.HIVpos)
combinedData.test.HIVneg <- cbind(metaboData.test.HIVneg,cytokineData.test.HIVneg)
combinedData.train$Group= as.factor(sampleData.train$Outcome)
combinedData.train$Group <- factor(combinedData.train$Group, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))
```

### Run randomforestSRC

```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(111)
rf_model <- rfsrc(Group ~ ., data = combinedData.train, ntree = 500, importance = TRUE)
vimp <- rf_model$importance
vimp[order(vimp[,1],decreasing = TRUE),]
vimp.rfsrc(rf_model)
min_depth <- var.select(rf_model)
selected_combined_SRC <- min_depth$md.obj$topvars
selected_combined_SRC_top2 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 2)
selected_combined_SRC_top5 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 5)
selected_combined_SRC_top7 <- head(min_depth$topvars, 7)
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC,file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top2, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top2_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top5, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top5_baseline_adult.rds")
saveRDS(selected_combined_SRC_top7, file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
```

### Run Boruta

```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(111)
boruta_data <- Boruta(Group~., data = combinedData.train, doTrace = 2, maxRuns=400)
boruta_data <- TentativeRoughFix(boruta_data)
boruta_stats <- attStats(boruta_data)
boruta_stats$cytokine <- rownames(boruta_stats)
boruta_stats <- boruta_stats %>% filter(decision =="Confirmed")
boruta_stats <- boruta_stats[order(boruta_stats$meanImp,decreasing = TRUE),c("cytokine","meanImp")]
plot(boruta_data, cex.axis = 1.1, xlab = "", las = 2,ylab="")
title("Cytokine",line=+1,adj=0,cex.main=2)
combined_boruta <- boruta_stats$cytokine
combined_boruta
save(combined_boruta,file="../Results/Boruta/selected_metabols_treatment.RData")
load("../Results/Boruta/selected_metabols_treatment.RData")
```


### Selected cytokines from Boruta

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# selected_combined <- read_rds(file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
selected_cytokines <-c("IL.17A")
selected_cytokines

data <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines ,drop=FALSE])
data$Class= as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$Outcome))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$Outcome))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$Outcome))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$Outcome))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_cytokine_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_cytokine_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_cytokine_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_cytokine_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_train,roc_cytokine_test,roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos,roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg)
```

### Selected metabolites from Boruta

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# selected_combined <- read_rds(file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE","ARACHIDONIC ACID", "MALATE" ,"EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"VALINE")
# selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE","EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"VALINE","ARACHIDONIC ACID")
# selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE","EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"ARACHIDONIC ACID")
# selected_metabols <- selected_metabols[1:2]

data <-as.data.frame(metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$Outcome))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$Outcome))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$Outcome))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE])
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$Outcome))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

```


#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_metabol_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_metabol_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_metabol_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_metabol_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_metabol_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_metabol_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_metabol_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_metabol_train,roc_metabol_test,roc_metabol_test_HIVpos,roc_metabol_test_HIVneg)
```

### Combined model

#### Make data ready for SVM

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# selected_combined <- read_rds(file="../Results/randomforestSRC/selectedCombined_top7_baseline_adult.rds")
selected_cytokines <- c("IL.17A")
selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE" ,"MALATE" ,"EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"ARACHIDONIC ACID" ,"VALINE")


data <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.train[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.train[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.train$Outcome))
data$Class <- factor(data$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test$Outcome))
data_test$Class <- factor(data_test$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVpos <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVpos[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVpos[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVpos$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVpos$Outcome))
data_test_HIVpos$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVpos$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))

data_test_HIVneg <- as.data.frame(cbind(cytokineData.test.HIVneg[,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE],metaboData.test.HIVneg[,selected_metabols,drop=FALSE]))
data_test_HIVneg$Class = as.factor(gsub(" ","",sampleData.test.HIVneg$Outcome))
data_test_HIVneg$Class <- factor(data_test_HIVneg$Class, levels =c("CURED","FAILED"))
```

#### Train SVM model

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fitControl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv",
                           number = 10,
                           repeats = 10,
                           classProbs = TRUE,
                           summaryFunction = twoClassSummary)  

svmGrid <- expand.grid(sigma = seq(0.01, 1, length.out = 10),
                       C = 2^seq(-5, 10, length.out = 10))

cl <- makeCluster(detectCores() - 1)
registerDoParallel(cl)

svmTune <- train(Class ~ ., data = data, 
                 method = "svmRadial",  
                 preProc = c("center", "scale"),
                 metric = "ROC",
                 tuneGrid = svmGrid,
                 trControl = fitControl)

stopCluster(cl)
```

#### Test and ROC {.tabset}
##### Train data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data)
prob_combined_train <- predict(svmTune, data, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_train[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_train <- roc0
```


##### Entire test data
###### Test SVM 

```{r}
pred_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test)
prob_combined_test <- predict(svmTune, data_test, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])


roc_combined_test <- roc0
```



##### Entire test data (only HIV pos)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos)
prob_combined_test_HIVpos <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVpos, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVpos$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVpos[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVpos$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVpos <- roc0
```










##### Entire test data (only HIV neg)
###### Test SVM svmTune 

```{r}
pred_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg)
prob_combined_test_HIVneg <- predict(svmTune, data_test_HIVneg, type="prob")
```

###### ROC curve

```{r}
roc0 <- roc(response = data_test_HIVneg$Class, 
            predictor = prob_combined_test_HIVneg[,1], 
            levels = rev(levels(data_test_HIVneg$Class)),ci=TRUE)

ciobj <- ci.se(roc0, specificities=seq(0, 1, l=25))
dat.ci <- data.frame(x = as.numeric(rownames(ciobj)),
                     lower = ciobj[, 1],
                     upper = ciobj[, 3])

roc_combined_test_HIVneg <- roc0
```










##### Both train and test

```{r}
bothrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test)
```

##### Both train and test and both HIV pos and HIV neg

```{r}
fourrocPlot_func(roc_combined_train,roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result <- threerocPlot_func_HIV(roc_combined_test,roc_combined_test_HIVpos,roc_combined_test_HIVneg)
result$plot
```

### Genarate figures
```{r}
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_cytokine_test,roc_metabol_test,
                            names=c("Combined","Cytokine","Metabolite"),colors=c("#50b957", "#d84882","#777acd"))
result$plot  
Fig4_total <- result$plot 
result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_combined_test, roc_combined_test_HIVpos, roc_combined_test_HIVneg, names=c("Combined","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#50b957", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig4_combined_HIV <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_cytokine_test, roc_cytokine_test_HIVpos, roc_cytokine_test_HIVneg,names=c("Cytokine","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#d84882",  "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig4_cytokine_HIV <- result$plot 

result <- threerocPlot_func(roc_metabol_test, roc_metabol_test_HIVpos, roc_metabol_test_HIVneg,
                            names=c("Metabolite","HIV-positive","HIV-negative"),colors=c("#7b63d4", "red","#d89f32"))
result$plot  
Fig4_metabol_HIV <- result$plot 

save(Fig4_metabol_HIV,Fig4_cytokine_HIV,Fig4_total, Fig4_combined_HIV,file="../Results/Fig4-ROCs-treatment.RData")
```

## Data at baseline (only adults) - Enrichment of 6 markers treatment response
### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp.RData")
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp+1)%>%as.data.frame()
selected_cytokines <-c("IL.17A")
selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE","ARACHIDONIC ACID", "MALATE" ,"EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"VALINE")

SA_samples <- read_excel("../../Data/sa samples_JMC.xlsx")
SA_samples$LONGID <- gsub("SA","",SA_samples$ID)
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")

ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[match(SA_samples$ID,ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID),"Outcome"] <- SA_samples$`New Group`
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp%>%filter(Outcome!="EXCLUDE")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[which(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Visit.Week==17|ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Visit.Week==26),"Visit.Week"] <- "17/26"

inputData <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp_imputed[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE]
inputData$Visit.Week <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Visit.Week, levels=c("0","8","17/26"))
inputData$Outcome <- as.character(factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome, levels=c("CURED","FAILED")))
inputData$LONGID <- as.character(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$LONGID)
inputData_melted <- melt(inputData)
inputData_melted$Type="Cytokine"

inputData <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$ID,selected_metabols]
inputData$Visit.Week <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Visit.Week, levels=c("0","8","17/26"))
inputData$Outcome <- as.character(factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$Outcome, levels=c("CURED","FAILED")))
inputData$LONGID <- as.character(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_TreatmentFollowUp$LONGID)
inputData_melted_temp <- melt(inputData)
inputData_melted_temp$Type="Metabol"
inputData_melted_temp$variable <- tolower(inputData_melted_temp$variable)
inputData_melted <- rbind(inputData_melted,inputData_melted_temp)
inputData_melted <- inputData_melted%>%filter(!is.na(Outcome))


ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_noTB <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult%>%filter(TB=="No")
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
selected_cytokines <-c("IL.17A")
selected_metabols <- c("TYROSINE","ARACHIDONIC ACID", "MALATE" ,"EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID" ,"VALINE")
inputData <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_noTB$ID,selected_cytokines,drop=FALSE]
inputData$Visit.Week <- "ORD"
inputData$Outcome <- "ORD"
inputData$LONGID <- NA
inputData_melted_temp <- melt(inputData)
inputData_melted_temp$Type="Cytokine"

inputData <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult_noTB$ID,selected_metabols]
inputData$Visit.Week <- "ORD"
inputData$Outcome <- "ORD"
inputData$LONGID <- NA
inputData_melted_temp2 <- melt(inputData)
inputData_melted_temp2$Type="Metabol"
inputData_melted_temp2$variable <- tolower(inputData_melted_temp2$variable)
inputData_melted <- rbind(inputData_melted,inputData_melted_temp,inputData_melted_temp2)
```

### Visualization

```{r}
outcome_colors <- c("ORD" = "#ca6332","CURED" = "#3d814b", "FAILED" = "#cf3f42")  

plot <- ggplot(inputData_melted, aes(x = factor(Visit.Week), y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, color = "black", fill = "snow") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Outcome), size = 2, position = position_jitter(width = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=outcome_colors,labels=c("ORD"="ORD","CURED"="PTB-CURED","FAILED"="PTB-FAILED"))+
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 26) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 26), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 26),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Visit Week", y = expression(bold(log[2](Plasma_Concentration))), color = "")

pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 4-b-1.pdf",width = 21,height = 10)
plot
dev.off()

plot <- ggplot(inputData_melted, aes(x = factor(Visit.Week), y = value, color = Outcome)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Outcome), 
               outlier.shape = NA, 
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha=0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 2, 
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.8)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = outcome_colors,
                     labels = c("ORD"="ORD","CURED"="PTB-CURED","FAILED"="PTB-FAILED")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_colors,
                    labels = c("ORD"="ORD","CURED"="PTB-CURED","FAILED"="PTB-FAILED")) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 26) +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 26), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 26, face="bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 26),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Visit Week", y = expression(bold(log[2](Plasma_Concentration))), color = "", fill = "")


pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 4-b-2.pdf",width = 21,height = 10)
plot
dev.off()
```

## Make Figure 4

```{r}
load("../Results/Fig4-ROCs-treatment.RData")
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 4.pdf",width=32,height = 20)
plot_grid(Fig4_total,NULL,NULL,ncol=3,labels = c("a"),label_size = 36)/plot_grid(Fig4_combined_HIV,Fig4_cytokine_HIV,Fig4_metabol_HIV,ncol = 3,labels=c("c","d","e"),label_size = 36)
dev.off()
```


## Data at baseline (only adults) - Pathway enrichment 

### Ion mode {.tabset}

#### Positive mode 

##### Read feature table 

```{r}
feature_table <- read.delim("../../Data/Quantified Metabolomics Data/Untargeted/ComBat_mzcalibrated_untargeted_mediansummarized_featuretable_hilicpos.txt")
l <- load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")

feature_table <- feature_table[,c(1,2,11:ncol(feature_table))]
feature_table%>%colnames()
feature_table <- feature_table[,c(1,2,which(colnames(feature_table)%in%ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$hilicposFileName))]
which(!feature_table%>%colnames()%in%ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$hilicposFileName)
feature_table <- feature_table[,c("mz","time",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$hilicposFileName)]
any(is.na(feature_table))
```

##### Run linear model on each feature using p-values

```{r}
feature_table_value <- feature_table[,-c(1,2)]  # numeric features

covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("noTB","TB","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(TB-noTB,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(feature_table_value, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)


ttest_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(fit.b$p.value,fit.b$t))

ttest_df$adj_p <- p.adjust(fit.b$p.value, method = "BH")
ttest_df <- cbind(feature_table[,c("mz","time")],ttest_df)
head(ttest_df)
names(ttest_df) <- c("m/z","retention time","p-value","statistic","adj-p")
ttest_df_input <- ttest_df%>%select(`m/z`,`retention time`,`p-value`,statistic)
ttest_df_input <- ttest_df_input%>%arrange(`p-value`)
write.table(ttest_df_input,file="../Results/Mummichog/lineartest-pos.txt",sep = "\t",quote = FALSE,row.names=FALSE)
```


##### Visualization with Manhattan plot

```{r}
Fig5_pos_manhat_1 <- manhattan_plot(ttest_df_input,alpha_threshold = 0.0001,x_axis = "m/z")
Fig5_pos_manhat_2 <- manhattan_plot(ttest_df_input,alpha_threshold = 0.0001,x_axis = "retention time")
```
#### Negative mode

##### Read feature table 

```{r}
feature_table <- read.delim("../../Data/Quantified Metabolomics Data/Untargeted/ComBat_mzcalibrated_untargeted_mediansummarized_featuretable_c18neg.txt")
l <- load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")

feature_table <- feature_table[,c(1,2,11:ncol(feature_table))]
feature_table%>%colnames()
feature_table <- feature_table[,c(1,2,which(colnames(feature_table)%in%ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$c18negFileName))]
which(!feature_table%>%colnames()%in%ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$c18negFileName)
feature_table <- feature_table[,c("mz","time",ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$c18negFileName)]
any(is.na(feature_table))
```

##### Run linear model on each feature using p-values

```{r}
feature_table_value <- feature_table[,-c(1,2)]  # numeric features

covareiateData <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[,c("AGE","HIV","Sex"),drop=FALSE]
f <- factor(ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB)
design <- model.matrix(~0+f+AGE+HIV+Sex,data=covareiateData)
colnames(design) <- c("noTB","TB","Age","HIV","Sex")
cont.matrix <- makeContrasts(TB-noTB,levels=design)
fit <- lmFit(feature_table_value, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, cont.matrix)
fit.b <- eBayes(fit2)


ttest_df <- as.data.frame(cbind(fit.b$p.value,fit.b$t))

ttest_df$adj_p <- p.adjust(fit.b$p.value, method = "BH")
ttest_df <- cbind(feature_table[,c("mz","time")],ttest_df)
head(ttest_df)
names(ttest_df) <- c("m/z","retention time","p-value","statistic","adj-p")
ttest_df_input <- ttest_df%>%select(`m/z`,`retention time`,`p-value`,statistic)
ttest_df_input <- ttest_df_input%>%arrange(`p-value`)
write.table(ttest_df_input,file="../Results/Mummichog/lineartest-neg.txt",sep = "\t",quote = FALSE,row.names=FALSE)
```


##### Visualization with Manhattan plot

```{r}
Fig5_neg_manhat_1 <- manhattan_plot(ttest_df_input,alpha_threshold = 0.0001,x_axis = "m/z")
Fig5_neg_manhat_2 <- manhattan_plot(ttest_df_input,alpha_threshold = 0.0001,x_axis = "retention time")
```

### Pathways enriched using linearmodel results

```{r}
Mummichog_pos <- read_excel("../Results/Mummichog/lineartest-pos/tables/mcg_pathwayanalysis_lineartest-pos.xlsx")
Mummichog_neg <- read_excel("../Results/Mummichog/lineartest-neg/tables/mcg_pathwayanalysis_lineartest-neg.xlsx")
Mummichog_pos$`adjp-value` <- p.adjust(Mummichog_pos$`p-value`,method = "BH")
Mummichog_neg$`adjp-value` <- p.adjust(Mummichog_neg$`p-value`,method = "BH")
Mummichog_sig <- Mummichog_pos%>%filter(`p-value`<0.05)%>%mutate(ion="pos")%>%
  bind_rows(Mummichog_neg%>%filter(`p-value`<0.05)%>%mutate(ion="neg"))
Mummichog_sig <- Mummichog_sig%>%filter(`adjp-value`<= 0.05)%>%mutate(highlight="Yes")%>%
  bind_rows(Mummichog_sig%>%filter(`adjp-value`> 0.05)%>%mutate(highlight="No"))

Mummichog_sig$logP <- -log10(Mummichog_sig$`p-value`)
Mummichog_sig <- Mummichog_sig%>%arrange(`p-value`)
Mummichog_sig$pathway <- factor(Mummichog_sig$pathway,levels=unique(Mummichog_sig$pathway))

Mummichog_sig <- Mummichog_sig %>%
  mutate(label_color = ifelse(highlight == "Yes", "red", "black"))

Fig5_pathways <- ggplot(Mummichog_sig, aes(y = pathway, x = logP)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = 0, yend = pathway), color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_point(aes(color = ion), size = 12, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = overlap_size), size = 12,  color="black",face="bold",vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#bf4eb4", "#89b436"), labels=c("pos"="Positive","neg"="Negative"),name = "Ion Mode: ") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0.01, 0), limits = c(0, 4.5)) +
  labs(x = expression(bold(-log[10](FDR-corrected_p-value))), y = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 26) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 26,color=Mummichog_sig$label_color),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 26),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 26, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 26)
  )
pdf(file="../Resfults/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 5-c-1.pdf",width = 15,height = 10)
Fig5_pathways
dev.off()

pos_list <- Mummichog_sig%>%filter(ion=="pos")%>%select(pathway)%>%unlist()
neg_list <- Mummichog_sig%>%filter(ion=="neg")%>%select(pathway)%>%unlist()

venn_data <- list(
  Negative = neg_list,
  Positive = pos_list
)

library(ggvenn)
vennPlot <- ggvenn(
  venn_data,
  fill_color = c("#bf4eb4", "#89b436"),
  set_name_size = 26,  
  text_size = 26      
) 
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 5-c-2.pdf",width = 20,height = 20)
vennPlot
dev.off()
```

## Data at baseline (only adults) - correlation plot

### Load data

```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../Results/DEA/DEC_Baseline_Adult.RData")
load("../Results/DEA/DEM_Baseline_Adult.RData")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult),ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),]
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]

input_metabolites <- volcanoPlot_data_MET%>%filter(qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%select(Metabolite)%>%unlist()
input_cytokines <- volcanoPlot_data_CYT%>%filter(qValue.TB.noTB<0.05)%>%select(Cytokine)%>%unlist()
input_metaboData <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[,input_metabolites]
input_cytoData <- CytokineData_Baseline_Adult_imputed[,input_cytokines]
```

### Visualization using Chord plot

```{r}
res <- rcorr(as.matrix(input_metaboData), as.matrix(input_cytoData), type = "pearson")

cor_mat <- res$r
p_mat   <- res$P

metabolite_names <- colnames(input_metaboData)
cytokine_names   <- colnames(input_cytoData)

cor_sub <- cor_mat[metabolite_names, cytokine_names]
p_sub   <- p_mat[metabolite_names, cytokine_names]

df_long <- melt(cor_sub, varnames = c("Metabolite", "Cytokine"), value.name = "Correlation")
df_long$p.value <- melt(p_sub)$value
df_long$adj.p.value <- p.adjust(df_long$p.value,method = "fdr")
df_sig <- df_long%>%filter(adj.p.value<0.05, abs(Correlation)>0.3)

links <- data.frame(from = df_sig$Metabolite,
                    to   = df_sig$Cytokine,
                    value = df_sig$Correlation)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), c("blue", "white", "red"))

grid.col <- c(setNames(rep("#7b63d4", length(metabolite_names)), tolower(metabolite_names)),
              setNames(rep("#d84882", length(cytokine_names)), cytokine_names))

library(circlize)

links$from <- tolower(links$from)

pdf("../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure5-d.pdf", width = 14, height = 10)

circos.par(
  track.margin = c(0.01, 0.01),
  canvas.xlim = c(-1.4, 1.4),
  canvas.ylim = c(-1.4, 1.4)
)

chordDiagram(
  links,
  transparency = 0.4,
  grid.col = grid.col,
  col = col_fun(links$value),
  annotationTrack = "grid",
  preAllocateTracks = list(track.height = 0.05)
)

circos.trackPlotRegion(
  track.index = 1,
  panel.fun = function(x, y) {
    sector.name = get.cell.meta.data("sector.index")
    
    circos.text(
      x = get.cell.meta.data("xcenter"),
      y = get.cell.meta.data("ylim")[1],
      labels = sector.name,
      facing = "clockwise",
      niceFacing = TRUE,
      adj = c(0, 0.5),
      cex = 2,
      font = 1
    )
  },
  bg.border = NA
)

circos.clear()
dev.off()
```




## Data at baseline (only adults) - box plot for fatty acid markers
### Load data
```{r}
load("../../Data/ReadyData/ReadyData_Baseline_Adult.RData")
ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult[match(row.names(CytokineData_Baseline_Adult),ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID),]
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- log2(MetaboData_Baseline_Adult+1)%>%as.data.frame()
MetaboData_Baseline_Adult <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$ID,]

fatty_acids <- c(
  "ARACHIDIC ACID",
  "ARACHIDONIC ACID",
  "DOCOSAHEXAENOIC ACID",
  "DOCOSATETRAENOIC ACID",
  "EICOSADIENOIC ACID",
  "EICOSAPENTAENOIC ACID",
  "GONDOIC ACID",
  "HOMOLINOLENIC ACID",
  "LINOLENIC ACID",
  "PALMITOLEIC ACID"
)
input_data <- MetaboData_Baseline_Adult[,fatty_acids]
input_data$TB <- ClinicalData_Baseline_Adult$TB
input_data <- melt(input_data)
input_data$variable <- tolower(input_data$variable)
boxplot <- boxplot_func(input_data,xaxis = "variable",yaxis = "value",group = "TB"  )
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 5-e.pdf",width = 20, height = 15)
boxplot
dev.off()

```

## Make Figure 5

```{r}
pdf(file="../Results/Figures/Manuscript/Figure 5.pdf",height = 10,width = 32)
plot_grid(Fig5_neg_manhat_1,Fig5_pos_manhat_1,Fig5_pathways, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5,1.75))
dev.off()
```
